The Fifth House 223
though an even sign in Rasi is occupied by lord of vitality,
viz., the Sun and the Beeja has not only fallen in a benefic
sign but is aspected by Jupiter and Saturn. The 5th from
Beeja is occupied by Jupiter. In the Navamsa. the Beeja
occupies an odd Rasi and the 5th is free from evil planets.
These indicate the strength of the Beeja.
